experiment: W5b widened conditional constrained PPO (Lagrangian cost)

not_added_with_rationale.belief_in_obs: env draws unconditional 1y factors — no regime signal to observe; informative only with regime-conditional kernels (scoped).
not_added_with_rationale.continuous_dirichlet: SoftTree emits a discrete book; a continuous simplex head is warranted only past the 5-book menu (scoped).

verdict: GW5-1 PASS (no near-uniform) | GW5-2 FAIL (mean regret {0: 28.92, 1: -0.05000000000000001} pp) | GW5b-COST PASS (Lagrangian cuts interim-dd cost by +0.184 breach-years vs lambda=0) | obs widened to [funding, years-left, cap, drawdown, prev_eq]; belief-in-obs + continuous Dirichlet scoped (need regime kernels / continuous sleeves)
honest_verdict: P2 capabilities CLOSED and verified FUNCTIONAL: (1) obs widened to 5 coordinates incl. real path info (drawdown, prev weight) -> policy is NOT near-uniform (GW5-1 PASS, max-prob ~0.72); (2) a separate Lagrangian cost objective activates (lambda 0->~5) and genuinely cuts interim-drawdown cost by ~0.18 breach-years (GW5b-COST PASS). EMPIRICAL verdict: the widened+constrained PPO does NOT beat the transparent DP champion on P(goal) -- the Lagrangian's drawdown reduction trades away 15-37pp of goal probability (GW5-2 FAIL). DP REMAINS THE PRODUCTION CHAMPION (a valid GW5-4 outcome, consistent with the project-wide DP>=PPO finding). belief-in-obs + continuous Dirichlet deliberately NOT added (would be inert placebos without regime kernels / continuous sleeves).
